ade
ek dho
theen chaar oththukkadi
naan onnonnaa

theen chaar oththukkadi

solli tharren katthukadi

ek dho theen chaar
ek dho theen chaar

ade sakkaraththa
kattikittu kaalaada
enna thalli
ninnu nejoram naan thaeda

en nethiyila thaan
thottu ippo malapaadu
adhu nattanadu
mudhugukku paaindhoda

mazha mela
pogum megam ellaam
ippo thala mela vandhu
thottu thottu thoorudhe

ek dho
theen chaar oththukkadi
naan onnonnaa
solli tharren katthukadi

oru ticketula
rendu perum paakkum cinema
ada neeyum naanum
ottugira color filim-ah

ada madhiramaa thandhirama
enna pannura
nee pakkaama paathukitte
enna kollura

panja pola unna maathapporen
kaatha pola una mela
thookki poren de de.

theen chaar oththukuren
nee

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ek Dho Theen'?

The song 'Ek Dho Theen' is an energetic dance number that captures the spirit of celebration and joy, reflecting the lively moments in the movie.

What is the plot context of the movie Anjaan?

Anjaan is an action thriller that revolves around the life of a gangster and his struggles, with the song highlighting the festive and carefree moments amidst the chaos.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Surya, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Ek Dho Theen' released?

'Ek Dho Theen' was released on July 23, 2014, as part of the movie Anjaan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ek Dho Theen', the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the celebratory moments in the movie Anjaan. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of joy and excitement, making it an ideal track for parties and celebrations. The collaboration between Andrea Jeremiah and Surya brings a unique flair to the song, enhancing its appeal. Overall, the song encapsulates the spirit of fun and festivity, leaving listeners in high spirits.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ek Dho Theen from Anjaan is a vibrant and energetic track that showcases the unique collaboration between the soulful voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Surya. With Yuvan's electrifying music, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the infectious rhythm and lively beats that make this song a party anthem!
stanzaMeanings: I will tell you one by one, don't worry.
The heart is burning like fire, it is getting ready.
I will tell you one by one, don't worry.
With sweetness, I will push you away, I will search for you with my eyes.
I have touched you with my eyes, now it is raining, that is the end of the show.
The clouds that bring rain are now coming and touching the head.
I will tell you one by one, don't worry.
In one ticket, two people watch a movie, you and I are in a colorful film.
What are you doing like this? Without looking at me, what are you planning to do?
Like a thorn, I will lift you up like a flower.
I will take you in my heart, I will hold you in my embrace.
I will tell you one by one, don't worry.
